title: License waiver manifest (ADR-046, Milestone C)
description: Records justified exceptions to scripts/license-allowlist.ts. Anything outside the allowlist must appear here with a reviewer + justification or fetch-assets / build-image-provenance fails closed.

license_short.description: License id appearing in image-provenance.json that is NOT in the allowlist.

scope.description: What the waiver applies to — single path, glob, or 'all' for blanket waiver.

justification.description: Plain-language reason. Must explain why this license is acceptable for our distribution model.

reviewer.description: GitHub handle of the reviewer who approved this waiver.

expires_at.description: Optional expiry — re-review required after this date.
